goal: 精简 0g.hk agent skill 并用 npx skills 更新全局安装

summary.title: Installable 0g.hk skill package and Mainline setup
summary.what: Initialized Mainline for the repository and added a concise installable 0g-hk skill package at skill-packages/0g-hk/SKILL.md.
summary.why: The existing global skill had grown into a duplicated API manual. The user asked to manage the work with Mainline, fix the skill in the repository, push it, and update the installed skill through npx skills.
summary.user_goal: 精简 0g.hk agent skill 并用 npx skills 更新全局安装

decisions.chose: Use skill-packages/0g-hk instead of a repo-local .agents/skills path.
decisions.rationale: This keeps the repo as the package source without making it a live local discovery root or mixing install artifacts with source.
rejected: Keep editing the global installed copy as the source of truth

decisions.chose: Keep SKILL.md to routing and guardrails only, and delegate exact API details to https://0g.hk/llms.txt plus docs/API.md.
decisions.rationale: The previous skill duplicated API docs and became stale; the live manual and repo docs are better truth surfaces.

decisions.chose: Guide agents to store local history in ~/.local/share/0g-hk/links.jsonl and read the legacy installed-skill path if present.
decisions.rationale: npx skills manages the installed skill directory, so runtime token history should live outside that package tree.
rejected: Continue treating ~/.agents/skills/0g-hk/links.jsonl as the only ledger path

decisions.chose: Prefer JSON body token edits and renewals over query-string ?edit= usage.
decisions.rationale: The current API supports JSON body edits, which avoids putting secret edit tokens into URLs, shell history, and copied links.
rejected: Keep ?edit= as the primary automated path

rejected.alternative: Commit links.jsonl or copied edit tokens with the skill package.
rejected.reason: Those files are local secret-bearing runtime data, not source code or package content.

rejected.alternative: Keep references/api.md as part of the skill package.
rejected.reason: It would duplicate docs/API.md and /llms.txt and had already drifted from current Markdown table support.

risks: If the legacy links.jsonl is not migrated or backed up before a future installer replaces the old global skill directory, local edit-token history could be lost.

anti_patterns.what: Treating the global installed 0g-hk skill copy as the source of truth
anti_patterns.why: The installable package now lives in the repository; editing the installed copy recreates drift and bypasses review/push/update flow.

anti_patterns.what: Publishing editToken, editPath, or editUrl in public output by default
anti_patterns.why: Those values grant edit or renewal control over a specific temporary link and should only be exposed when the user explicitly wants an editable entry.

followups: Push the Mainline init and skill package commits to origin/main.
Migrate or copy the existing legacy links.jsonl to ~/.local/share/0g-hk/links.jsonl before reinstalling the global skill.
Run npx skills add from the pushed repository and verify the installed 0g-hk skill.

architectural_claims: The repository now owns an installable agent skill package for 0g.hk under skill-packages/0g-hk.
The skill package is separate from global runtime installation and from local token history.
behavioral_changes: npx skills add . --full-depth --list discovers the 0g-hk skill from the repository.
Once installed, agents should trigger on 0g.hk/og temporary link and paste workflows using concise guardrails rather than a copied API manual.

data_model_changes.name: 0g.hk local links ledger
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Copy any existing ~/.agents/skills/0g-hk/links.jsonl to the new location and keep mode 600; agents should still read the legacy path if present.

security_implications: editToken, editPath, and editUrl remain treated as secrets and must not be committed or exposed publicly by default.
Keeping the ledger outside the installed skill package reduces accidental loss or exposure during npx skills updates.
migration_notes: Before reinstalling, copy any existing ~/.agents/skills/0g-hk/links.jsonl to ~/.local/share/0g-hk/links.jsonl and keep permissions at 600.
Use npx skills add catoncat/0g-hk --full-depth --skill 0g-hk -g -a codex -y after pushing.
